Best BTech Colleges in India: Fees, Courses, Admission 2026, Placements

  • Overview
  • JEE Main vs JEE Advanced Prep
  • Colleges accepting JEE Main Score
  • JEE Main Exam Details

5230 Best BTech Colleges in India: Fees, Courses, Admission 2026, Placements

If you are looking at a complete list of top engineering colleges in India, then you can find 4900+ engineering colleges here on Shiksha. Out of which 3700+ engineering colleges are privately owned, 700+ engineering colleges are owned by government and more than 50 engineering colleges are semi-government engineering colleges. JEE Main is the national-level exam that is accepted in most central and state government, and private B.Tech colleges across the country. The top government and private colleges include IIT Bombay, IIT Madras, VIT Vellore, BITS Pilani, SRM IST, Amity University Noida, and LPU , among others.
Table of Contents
  1. Best BTech Colleges in India: Highlights 2026
  2. NIRF Ranking 2025 of Top BTech Colleges in India
  3. Eligibility Criteria of the Best BTech Colleges in India 2026
  4. Entrance Exams Accepted by t
Read more
If you are looking at a complete list of top engineering colleges in India, then you can find 4900+ engineering colleges here on Shiksha. Out of which 3700+ engineering colleges are privately owned, 700+ engineering colleges are owned by government and more than 50 engineering colleges are semi-government engineering colleges. JEE Main is the national-level exam that is accepted in most central and state government, and private B.Tech colleges across the country. The top government and private colleges include IIT Bombay, IIT Madras, VIT Vellore, BITS Pilani, SRM IST, Amity University Noida, and LPU , among others.
Table of Contents
  1. Best BTech Colleges in India: Highlights 2026
  2. NIRF Ranking 2025 of Top BTech Colleges in India
  3. Eligibility Criteria of the Best BTech Colleges in India 2026
  4. Entrance Exams Accepted by the Top BTech Colleges in India 2026
  5. Best Private BTech Colleges in India
  6. ROI of the Best Private BTech Colleges in India
  7. Affordable Private BTech Colleges in India with High Placements
  8. Best Government BTech Colleges in India
  9. Best BTech Colleges in India Accepting Direct Admissions
  10. Zone-wise BTech Colleges in India
    • 10.1 BTech Colleges in North India
    • 10.2 BTech Colleges in South India
    • 10.3 BTech Colleges in East India
    • 10.4 BTech Colleges in West India
  11. Best Engineering Colleges in India: Comparison

Best BTech Colleges in India: Highlights 2026

IITs and NITs are considered the top most institutes for Engineering in India. However, many other private colleges are good alternatives if one can’t make it to IITs and NITs. These include BITs, VIT, MIT-MAHE, SRM, etc. Some of the most popular BTech specialisations are Computer Science, Electronics and Communication, AI and ML, Mechanical and Electronics. As per AICTE, Computer Science Engineering is the most employable branch among all specialisations. Here is all about the top B.Tech colleges in India. 

Particulars

Statistics

Total No. of B.Tech Colleges in India

4,900+ colleges 

Most accepted entrance exam

JEE Main, JEE Advanced and CUET
Tuition fee range of top colleges ~ INR 15,000 - INR 70 lakh
Median Salary range of BTech graduates in India ~ INR 1 LPA - INR 46 LPA
Top BTech specialisations offered

CSE, IT, Mechanical, AI & ML, ECE, etc.
Note: All info. is from official sites and can change.

NIRF Ranking 2025 of Top BTech Colleges in India

NIRF is the standard ranking framework considered by the Indian government to rank institutes for higher education. In the last three years, no institute has been able to beat IIT Madras from the top ranking position as per NIRF standards. The table below shows the NIRF ranking 2024 and 2025 of the top Engineering colleges in India -

College Name NIRF 2024 NIRF 2025
IIT Madras Ranking 1 1
IIT Delhi Ranking 2 2
IIT Bombay Ranking 3 3
IIT Kanpur Ranking 4 4
IIT Kharagpur Ranking 5 5
IIT Roorkee Ranking 6 6
IIT Hyderabad Ranking 8 7
IIT Guwahati Ranking 7 8
NIT Tiruchirapalli 9 9
IIT BHU Varanasi Ranking 10 10

NOTE:

1. The above-mentioned rankings have been taken from official sites and may/will change in the future.

2. The above rankings are for the Engineering category under NIRF and not BTech.

Eligibility Criteria of the Best BTech Colleges in India 2026

The general eligibility criteria of the top BTech colleges in India are mentioned below -

  • Candidates must pass their Class 12 in PCM from a recognised university, with an aggregate of 50-75%.
  • They must clear an accepted entrance exam like JEE Main, JEE Advanced and CUET.
  • A few colleges also conduct their institute-level entrance exam for admission to BTech, such as SRMJEE for SRM IST, LPUNEST for LPU, etc.

Entrance Exams Accepted by the Top BTech Colleges in India 2026

Candidates have to clear the following national-level entrance exams for admission to the top BTech colleges in India. However, there are multiple state-level and university-level exams considered for BTech admission. Check their schedule and college predictor below -

Exams Schedule Exam College Predictor

JEE Main Exam

JEE Main Schedule

JEE Main College Predictor
JEE Advanced Exam JEE Advanced Schedule JEE Advanced College Predictor
CUET Exam CUET Schedule CUET College Predictor

Best Private BTech Colleges in India

Top private BTech colleges in India offer competitive alternatives to IITs and often charge high fees for the exposure, industry links, and their modern infrastructure. The BTech course in private colleges like VIT Vellore, BITS Pilani, SRM IST, etc., have great ROI, especially in CSE and other top specialisations. Find out the best private engineering colleges in India here with tuition fees and seat intake -

Private Colleges Tuition Fee BTech Seat Intake
VIT Vellore BTech INR 6.92 lakh - INR 7.8 lakh 3,060
BITS Pilani BTech INR 25.85 lakh 2,547
SRMIST BTech INR 11 lakh - INR 19 lakh 6,195
LPU BTech INR 8.4 lakh - INR 16 lakh 1,140
Chandigarh University BTech INR 7.96 lakh - INR 13.56 lakh -
Amrita School of Engineering BTech INR 10 lakh - INR 24 lakh 1,500
Amity University Noida BTech INR 9.08 lakh - INR 14 lakh 540
Thapar University BTech INR 10.96 lakh - INR 20.56 lakh 3,968
IIIT Hyderabad BTech INR 18 lakh 517
Manipal Institute of Technology, MAHE BTech INR 8.44 lakh - INR 15.04 lakh 2,776

ROI of the Best Private BTech Colleges in India

The ROI of top private BTech colleges in India is generally strong, despite higher tuition fees (INR 4 – 25+ lakh). Most of the BTech colleges offer solid placements with a median package ranging from INR 5 – 12+ LPA, especially for CSE and tech branches. Here is the table showing the top private BTech colleges in India with their fees and salary -

College Names

Total Tuition Fee

Median Placement Package
Thapar University Placements INR 10.96 lakh - INR 20.56 lakh INR 10 LPA - INR 11.89 LPA
SOA University - Siksha 'O' Anusandhan Placements INR 5.1 lakh - INR 12.2 lakh INR 5.7 LPA
LPU Placements INR 8.4 lakh - INR 16 lakh INR 7.07 LPA
Amity University, Noida Placements INR 9.08 lakh - INR 14 lakh INR 6 LPA
Kalasalingam Academy of Research and Education Placements INR 4 lakh - INR 7.4 lakh INR 6.75 LPA

Note: All info. is from official sites and can change.

Affordable Private BTech Colleges in India with High Placements

Generally, private BTech colleges in India are more expensive than government colleges. However, there are some affordable colleges also available. Some of them are mentioned below with their tuition fees and placement package -

Private BTech Colleges Low Tuition Fees Median Package
Bharati Vidyapeeth College of Engineering, Delhi Courses INR 3.3 lakh - INR 4.7 lakh INR 6 LPA
St. Joseph's College of Engineering, Chennai Courses INR 1.4 lakh - INR 2 lakh INR 6 LPA
Pune Institute of Computer Technology, Pune Courses INR 2.4 lakh - INR 4.2 lakh INR 7 LPA - INR 9.7 LPA

Note: All info. is from official sites and can change.

Best Government BTech Colleges in India

The top government BTech colleges in India like IITs (Bombay, Delhi, Madras), and NITs (Trichy, Surathkal) have relatively lower tuition fees compared to private colleges, resulting in high ROI. The tuition fee goes upto INR 15 lakh. These colleges accept JEE Main and JEE Advanced exam. Some of the top government B Tech colleges in India are mentioned below, along with their tuition fee and seat intake -

Public/Govt. Colleges

Tuition Fee

 BTech Seat Intake

IIT Bombay BTech

INR 8 lakh

 1,461
IIT Kharagpur BTech INR 8 lakh 2,942

IIT Delhi BTech

INR 8 lakh

 1,179
IIT Madras BTech

INR 8 lakh

 886

NIT Trichy BTech

INR 5 lakh

 981

Note: All info. is from official sites and may vary. 

Best BTech Colleges in India Accepting Direct Admissions

While a majority of BTech colleges accept national, state-level entrance exams, there is an option to get direct admission basis various quotas (merit/ management). The table below lists the best BTech colleges in India offering admission without an entrance exam - 

Top Colleges Tuition Fee Direct Admission Process
DIT University Admission INR 5.4 lakh - INR 10 lakh Direct Admission for Class 12 board toppers - 10% seats reserved.
PSGCT Coimbatore Admission INR 2 lakh - INR 2.5 lakh through the management quota
TIET Admission INR 10 lakh - INR 20.6 lakh A few seats are reserved for students based on Class 12 scores
KIIT - Kalinga Institute of Industrial Technology Admission INR 17.6 lakh through management quota or for exceptional profiles (93%+ in boards) by contacting the admission cell. 

Note: All info. is from official sites and can change.

Zone-wise BTech Colleges in India

Listed below are the zone-wise distribution of BTech colleges in India -

BTech Colleges in North India

Top BTech colleges in North India include IITs (Delhi, Kanpur, Roorkee), offering the best placements and great ROI. Top BTech colleges in Delhi-NCR, Chandigarh and Uttar Pradesh provide top-notch engineering education. Listed below are some of the best North Indian BTech colleges in India along with their tuition fees -

Fee Range Top North Indian BTech Colleges in India
Upto INR 5 lakh GL Bajaj Institute of Technology & Management, Greater Noida, ABES Engineering College, Ghaziabad, JSS Academy of Technical Education, Noida, etc.
INR 5 lakh - INR 15 lakh Amity University, Noida, Galgotias University, Sharda University, Greater Noida, LPU, etc.
INR 15 lakh - INR 25 lakh JIIT Noida, Bennett University, Greater Noida, etc.
INR > 25 lakh BITS Pilani, Ashoka University, etc.

Source: Official site of the colleges and may vary.

BTech Colleges in South India

South Indian BTech colleges are among the best in India offer strong placement and industry connections in Bangalore and Hyderabad. Among top colleges are IIT Madras, NIT Trichy, VIT Vellore and IIT Hyderabad with very specialized skill based educational curriculum. Some of the top colleges are given below -

Fee Range Top South Indian BTech Colleges in India
Upto INR 5 lakh JNTU Hyderabad, Anna University, Osmania University, etc.
INR 5 lakh - INR 15 lakh SRM Institute of Science and Technology, Vellore Institute of Technology, Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham, SASTRA University, etc.
INR 15 lakh - INR 25 lakh RV College of Engineering, BMS College of Engineering, etc.
INR > 25 lakh BITS Pilani Hyderabad, etc.

Source: Official site of the colleges and may vary.

BTech Colleges in East India

BTech colleges in East India are a mix of leading national institutes and good state-level colleges and have good placement and competitive technical education. Some of the top colleges include IIT Kharagpur (NIRF 2025 rank 5), IIT Guwahati and NIT Patna with an average placement package of INR 6–12 LPA with top packages above INR 20 LPA. Some of the top colleges are given below - 

Fee Range Top East Indian BTech Colleges in India
Upto INR 5 lakh Government College of Engineering and Ceramic Technology, Kolkata, Assam Engineering College Guwahati, Jadavpur University Kolkata, etc.
INR 5 lakh - INR 10 lakh KIIT University, SOA University, Heritage Institute of Technology, etc.
INR 10 lakh - INR 15 lakh BIT Mesra, IIIT Ranchi
INR 15 lakh - INR 25 lakh

KGEC - Kalyani Government Engineering College

Source: Official site of the colleges and may vary.

BTech Colleges in West India

BTech colleges in West India (Maharashtra, Gujarat, Rajasthan, Goa) include top colleges like IIT Bombay, IIT Gandhinagar and BITS Pilani. They are known for strong academic research-based curriculum, high-quality placements and a wide variety of specialisations, especially in industrial hubs. Some of the top colleges are given below -

Fee Range Top West Indian BTech Colleges in India
Upto INR 5 lakh ICT Mumbai, College of Engineering Pune, VJTI Mumbai, LD College of Engineering, etc.

On Best BTech Colleges in India: Fees, Courses, Admission 2026, Placements
Q:   Which is the No. 1 Engineering college in India?
A: 

Hi, to determine the No. 1 Engineering college in India, you need to go through its NIRF rankings .The table below shows the top Engineering colleges in India along with their NIRF rankings 2025:

College NameNIRF 2023NIRF 2024NIRF 2025

IIT Delhi Ranking222

IIT Guwahati Ranking778

Q:   Is doing engineering from a private college a waste of money?
A: 

Not exactly. In fact, doing BTech from a reputed college can offer you more opportunities for campus placement. It all depends on the college & how much you learn from the faculty. The table below shows the ROI of top private engineering colleges in India having total tuition fee and average placement package offered by graduates:

Private CollegesTotal Tuition FeeAverage Placement Package
VIT VelloreINR 5 lakh - INR 8 lakhINR 7 LPA - INR 8 LPA
Chandigarh UniversityINR 5 lakh - INR 33 lakhINR 3 LPA - INR 8 LPA
LPUINR 5 lakh - INR 16 lakhINR 4 LPA - INR 7 LPA
BITS PilaniINR 20 lakhINR 18 LPA
Thapar UniversityINR 9 lakh - INR 15 lakhINR 10 LPA - INR 15 LPA

Hope this information proves beneficial for you!!

Q:   How many Engineering colleges are there in India?
A: 

There are about 4,700+ of the best Engineering colleges in India. Of these, 3,600+ colleges are privately owned, 700+ colleges are owned by the government, and 50+ colleges are owned by semi government institutions. JEE Main is the top entrance exam for admission to top Engineering colleges in India. Some of the top Engineering colleges in India are IIT Madras, IIT Delhi, IIT Roorkee, IIT Bombay, IIT Kanpur, IIT Kharagpur, NIT Trichy, Jadavpur University, and many more.

Q:   Which is the best distance college for BTech in Civil Engineering?
A: 

Some of the top Online college options for a BTech in Civil Engineering in India are here. Take a look

Know more about -

BTech Colleges in India

Q:   What is the fee of VIT University BTech course?
A: 

The total tuition fee for VIT Vellore BTech ranges between INR 4.9 lakh and 7.8 lakh. The total course fee, includes a caution deposit of INR 3,000 as well. The fee will vary as per the specialisation selected by the candidates. BTech is available in 24 specialisations, namely Computer Science and Engineering (Bioinformatics), Mechanical Engineering, Information Technology, Biotechnology, Chemical Engineering, etc. Aspirants are required to pay the course fee after completion of all the selection rounds to confirm their seats. Candidates can pay the registration fee via any of the online payment mode. The application fee is INR 1350.

A:

Hope this proves helpful for you!!

Q:   Do recruiters accept an online BTech degree for jobs?
A: 

Recruiters in India do not give value to online BTech courses anymore as they are not recognised by the AICTE and UGC and are considered invalid at present. The problem with online BTech degree is that it restricts your practical learning experience and limits your networking opportunities, both of which are very important in today's world to get a decent job in the market.

All of the top recruiters want a skilled pool of people who have a good knowledge of the technical know-how and have the right set of skills to be able to contribute to the growth of their business model. All of this is not possible in the online mode and hence, the recruiters do not accept students with an online BTech degree.

Read more: B Tech degree

Q:   What is the ranking of IIT Delhi?
A: 

IIT Delhi ranks amongst the top five IITs in India. IITD has ranked 2 under 'Engineering' and 4 under 'Overall' and 'Management' categories by the NIRF 2023. In the QS World University Rankings 2025, the institute has secured #150 position. Being one of the elite Engineering institutes of India, IIT Delhi has been ranked by multiple organisations under various categories such as MBA, Engineering, Research, etc. It has also ranked 4 by the NIRF 2023 under its new category 'Research Institutions'. Internationally, IIT Delhi ranked 197 by the QS World Ranking 2024 and 46 by the QS Asia Rankings 2023. It has ranked in the top 3 Engineering colleges for the last consecutive 5 years.

Q:   Can I join BTech without JEE?
A: 

Yes, you can join a BTech course without appearing for JEE in India. Many engineering colleges have their own entrance exams or other eligiblity for BTech..

A: 

Hi, IIT Roorkee has the total tuition fee ranging from INR 8 lakh - INR 11 lakh,  while IIT Kanpur has the lowest total tuition fee of INR 8 lakh.

Q:   Is doing BTech expensive in India?
A: 

Hi, It is estimated that studying BTech in India is not so expensive as most of the colleges (2,095) have annual fees ranging from INR 2-3 lakh. Listed below are the various BTech colleges in India which are having tuition fees in between INR 2-3 lakh:

College NameTotal Tuition Fee
DTUINR 3 lakh
SSN College of EngineeringINR 2 lakh
PSGCT CoimbatoreINR 2 lakh - INR 3 lakh
Ramaiah Institute of TechnologyINR 3 lakh
Guru Gobind Singh Indraprastha UniversityINR 2 lakh

Hope this information proves beneficial for you!!

Q:   Is an online BTech degree as valuable as an offline one?
A: 

The clear answer to this question is no. An online BTech degree is considered invalid in India after the strict guidelines of AICTE and UGC because they give a lot of value to practical training and classroom learning, which is not possible in the online mode of learning. If we talk about the core Engineering specializations like Civil Engineering, CSE, Mechanical Engg. and Electrical Engineering, all of these require hands-on practical training to be able to gain the right set of skills needed for the workforce in the job market.

So, it is better to go for a regular offline BTech degree if you want to have a successful career in the field of engineering and technology.

Know more about -

BTech Admission

Q:   Does NIT Trichy give scholarships to students?
A: 

Yes, NIT Trichy grants a wide range of scholarships as financial assistance to meritorious and various other category students. Students should fill the application form to secure the scholarship. This scholarship is available on the official website of the Institute. The decision regarding scholarships is made solely by the administration. NIT Tiruchirappalli provides scholarships like Adi-Dravidar Scholarship -Tamil, Adi-Dravidar Scholarship English SC/ST Scholarship, BC Scholarship, and others.

Commonly asked questions
On Best BTech Colleges in India: Fees, Courses, Admission 2026, Placements
Q:   Is online B.Tech degree valid in India?
A: 

The clear answer is no. An online BTech degree is not valid in India anymore. It is not approved by the All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE) because of a variety of reasons. One important reason is zero practical exposure. Technical programs like BTech are meant for the professional world, which demands technical expertise and advanced skills that is not possible in the online mode. Secondly, there is no lab assistance possible in online BTech courses, making it less valuable than regular face-to-face BTech programs.

Since, the UGC also does not recognize an online degree, there are hardly any job opportunities for online BTech degree holders in government organizations. Further, private job providers as well as MNCs also do not give value to online BTech anymore.

View other answers
Q:   Is there any future scope of BTech in India or abroad?
A: 

The scope of BTech is similar in both India and abroad. It's huge! You choose a specialisation in B.Tech and pursue your career in the same. BTech is one of the most sought-after courses in the Engineering field. 

BTech graduates with the latest skills and abilities are hired all around the world in world-class organizations, both government and private.

Know more about -

BTech Course Admission

Q:   What skills do top recruiters look for in BTech graduates?
A: 

A majority of the top recruiters in India look for some basic skills in all the BTech graduates, which make them an asset for the recruiter's business and they are ready to offer them handsome salary packages. A few of the important skills are given below:

  • Good Mathematical Aptitude
  • Logical Thinking Abilities
  • Problem-Solving Skills
  • Technical Proficiency
  • Attention to Detail
  • Team Management
  • Excellent Communication Skills
  • Analytical Approach and Passion for Learning
Q:   What is the tuition fees of BTech at IIT Hyderabad?
A: 

IIT Hyderabad offers BTech course three streams such as Engineering, IT & Software and Science. As per official website, the total BTech tuition fee is INR 8 lakh. However, the one-time fee for the course is INR 17,000. 

Q:   Is IIT Roorkee good for BTech?
A: 

By paying a total tuition fee amount of INR 8 lakh, students have the opportunity to score salary packages up to INR 27.94 LPA (the highest salary package during 2023 placements). Further, the average and median package offered during IIT Roorkee placement process of 2023 stood at INR 18.34 LPA and INR 18.09 LPA. In terms of ROI, the deal looks decent. In addition to this, the college ranks under the top 10 best institutes in the country for Engineering by NIRF 2022. Hence, BTech from IIT Roorkee is a good idea.

Commonly asked questions
On Best BTech Colleges in India: Fees, Courses, Admission 2026, Placements
Q:   Which entrance exam is accepted by DTU?
A: 

No, DTU does not conduct any entrance exam of its own for admission to any of the UG, PG or doctoral-level courses. Admission for the flagship BTech programme is based on JEE Main scores and the entire process of counselling are conducted by JAC Delhi. Further, DTU admission to all the remaining courses is mostly based on national/ university-level entrance exams, such as UCEED,  GATE,  CAT,  MAT and CMAT, among others. However, there are a few MBA specialised courses and BBA, admission to which is offered based on the past qualifying exam  (UG level) followed by an interview round. 

Q:   How good are the BTech placements at Amrita School of Engineering Coimbatore?
A: 

BTech is one of the most popular courses of Amrita School of Engineering. When it comes to the placements, the institute offers good placements annually. Check below to learn more.

Particulars

Placement Statistics (2025)

Highest package

INR 80.4 LPA

Average package

INR 9.08 LPA

Top recruiters

Amazon, TCS, Microsoft

Q:   Is the eligibility criteria for dual degree BTech admissions at IIT Guwahati different from regular BTech admissions?
A: 

No, the eligibility criteria for the dual degree BTech courses at IIT Guwahati remains the same as regular BTech courses.

Candidates need to clear Class 12 board exams with Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics as mandatory subjects to be eligible for the aforementioned dual degree courses. 

Selection criteria for these courses is also the same as regular BTech courses.

Q:   What are the essential qualifications for admission to BTech course at IIT BHU?
A: 

IIT Varanasi BTech admission is based on JEE Main and JEE Advanced. Students qualify Class 12 from the recognised board with 75% marks for general category and 65% marks for SC/ ST. PwD candidates. 

Q:   Is it worth pursuing BTech at Chandigarh University?
A: 

As per NIRF 2025 rankings, CU is ranked 31 under the 'Engineering' category and managed to improve its position from the last year's ranking, which was 32 in the year 2024. CU has set records for engineering education & is ranked among the Best Engineering Colleges in Punjab, India.

The students pursuing BTech from the university get excellent placement offers. The highest international and domestic packages offered during Chandigarh University placement 2025 was INR 170 LPA and INR 54.75 LPA, respectively.

Commonly asked questions
On Best BTech Colleges in India: Fees, Courses, Admission 2026, Placements
Q:   What is the JEE Main 2026 exam date for Session 2 ?
A: 

JEE Main 2026 Session 2 exam takes place in the month of April every year. Whereas, the application form for Session 2 will be available on the JEE Mains website. The exam is conducted by NTA.

Q:   What is LPU fees for BTech?
A: 

The total fee for BTech range from INR 4.5 lakh -INR 36 lakh. The fee is calculated based on the semester fee.  Admission to BTech course is based on LPUNEST or CUET UG score. After completion of the selection rounds, shortlisted aspirants need to pay the course fee to confirm their admission. Candidates are first required to register with an application fee for LPUNEST. The exam fee for LPUNEST is INR 1,000 for males and INR 500 for females.

Q:   What is the JEE Main application fee?
A: 

The application fees for JEE Main is written below

  • INR 1,000 for Male unreserved, OBC, EWS category candidates
  • INR 800 for Female unreserved/OBC/EWS category candidates
  • INR 500 for SC/ST/PwD/Transgender category candidates
Q:   What is the cost of JMI BTech CSE (Data Science) course?
A: 

The students who get selected for admission need to pay the first semester or admission fee. Jamia Milia Islamia BTech CSE (DS) tuition fee is INR 6.12 lakh. This fee is as per the official website/ sanctioning body. It is still subject to revision and hence, is indicative.

Q:   What is the fees for SOA BTech?
A: 

The total tuition fee for the BTech programme at SOA University ranges between INR 5.1 Lakhs - INR 11 lakhs. This range of fees does not include the cost of the mess or the hostel fee. There is a range in the fee structure because the fee for each specialisation can be slightly different from the other. The BTech programme at SOA University is also provided as a three-year lateral entry programme and in this case, the candidates will not have to pay for the first year of the prgramme. The fee mentioned here is taken from unofficial sources and can be indicative.
